name: operator-kit-cursor-adapter
description: Cursor adapter package for Agent Operator Kit rules, skills, project templates, and Cursor Agent setup prompts.
limitations: Cursor package metadata does not imply a Cursor runtime plugin API.
Cursor Cloud Agents are remote branch workers and cannot assume local tmux, simulators, OPERATOR_DIR, or local operator memory.
Project-local state remains explicit and inspectable in the target project.
